body_transformation: Meowth's fur transforms into layered steel plating with gunmetal gray and silver tones, maintaining its stocky muscular silhouette. The black-tipped ears and tail now feature polished chrome edges with subtle engraved geometric patterns along the curves. Black paw gloves become segmented metallic armor plates with reinforced knuckles, while facial markings shift to indigo etchings on the steel surface. Glowing blue energy lines pulse beneath the plating along the skeletal structure, enhancing the mechanical aesthetic without altering form.
signature_feature: Tail tip: polished chrome with engraved geometric patterns and glowing blue energy lines.
